summary: Replace slot-based inventory with a weight-based system capped by character strength.
approach: Add a `weight` field to the item table, a `carryCapacity` stat derived from strength, and rework the inventory UI to show a capacity bar instead of slots.

workstreams.name: Data model
workstreams.goal: Every item has a weight value and capacity is derived correctly
steps: Add weight column to item table
risks: Backfilling ~400 existing items by hand is slow and error-prone

workstreams.name: Inventory UI
workstreams.goal: Players can see current load vs capacity and get warned near the cap
steps: Replace slot grid with weight-based list view
Add capacity bar with warning state near cap

dependencies: Inventory UI workstream depends on Data model workstream
open_questions: Should mounts/pack animals get separate weight pools?
